about.intro: Elevating construction standards with design-build excellence since 2008.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Materials, trades, and inspections held to a single uncompromising standard.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Open books on allowances, schedules, and decisions — no black boxes.

services.title: General Contracting
services.description: Full-service general contracting for commercial and residential projects.

services.title: Renovation & Remodeling
services.description: Transform existing spaces with expert renovation and remodeling.

services.title: Project Management
services.description: Professional project management ensuring on-time, on-budget delivery.

faq.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes. CONSTRUCTO maintains all required state and local licenses, general liability insurance, and workers' compensation.

faq.question: How do I get a project estimate?
faq.answer: Contact us through our website or by phone. We'll schedule a consultation and provide a detailed written estimate at no obligation.

pricing.summary: Every quote is project-specific. Share your scope and the team replies within one business day with milestone pricing.

hero.headline: Build better. Faster. With zero surprises.
hero.body: We deliver high-end residential and commercial builds with a disciplined process.
